human_verification.notes: Reviewed financial-aid scope boundaries, evidence traceability, reconciliation logic, and boundary escalation for education-and-research workflows.

review_notes: Coverage includes financial charging, posting, reconciliation, and boundary escalation scenarios with explicit tenant adaptation handling.
Research summary captures required source classes and non-blocking unresolved ambiguities for operational adaptation.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary control prevents grading, ethics, legal, and unsupported financial-overwrite authority from being claimed.
Readiness, posting, and reconciliation outputs include explicit evidence ties and unresolved-variance blocks.
Escalation and reroute pathways are documented for legal/financial-policy, consent, and ethics changes.
notes: Runtime remains specification-based and does not claim retained-implementation authority.
Tenant-specific consent precedence, charge dictionary, and approval-owner mappings are required before high-confidence completion outcomes.
